name: Live Stream Vision
summary: Real-time visual awareness for the personal AI: screen share, camera, and frame-by-frame analysis via a vision model.
description: Lets the personal AI see a live video stream - a shared screen or a phone/desktop camera - and reason over it. Frames are sampled into a ring buffer, dispatched to a vision model (Gemini by default), and salient observations are written to memory. Session-scoped and operator-gated: the stream only runs while a session is explicitly open. Optional module; off unless enabled in the activation matrix.

config.GEMINI_API_KEY: Google AI API key for the vision model (required to enable)
